meta_title: For Students: Git with AI to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to Git with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Master Debugging: Git with AI for Intermediate Students
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Learn to leverage Git with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your development workflow and build professional apps.
content.answer_block: To debug effectively, integrate Git with AI agents. Use Git to isolate broken commits and Claude Code to perform deep-dive root cause analysis. By treating Git history as an audit trail for your AI agents, you can automate debugging, recover stable states instantly, and ship production-ready features faster than ever.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your application is a graveyard of silent errors. You’ve refactored the same function four times, and the stack trace feels like a cryptic riddle designed to break your spirit. We have all been there—staring at code that worked five minutes ago, now completely shattered.

But the era of manual, line-by-line debugging is over. By bridging the version control power of Git with the analytical intelligence of modern AI tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform from a frustrated student into a surgical engineer. This is how you reclaim your momentum and build software that actually lasts.

steps.title: Establish the Git Baseline
steps.description: Before debugging, ensure your current state is captured. This allows you to 'reset' your progress if the AI suggests an experimental fix that fails.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current working directory. Compare the last known good commit with the current state and identify the specific files modified since the last stable build.
steps.claude_code_command: git add . && git commit -m 'checkpoint: pre-debug state'

steps.title: Isolate the Regression
steps.description: Use Git bisect to pinpoint exactly which commit introduced the bug, minimizing the search area for the AI.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Help me construct a testing script that returns a non-zero exit code if the specific bug I am facing is present.
steps.claude_code_command: git bisect start && git bisect bad HEAD && git bisect good [commit-hash]

steps.title: Context-Aware AI Diagnosis
steps.description: Feed the Git diff and the error logs to Claude Code to generate a root cause hypothesis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Here is the diff from the last three commits and the stack trace. Identify the logical inconsistency causing the runtime error.
steps.claude_code_command: claude 'Analyze the recent git diffs and suggest a fix for the identified crash.'

steps.title: Simulate Fixes in a Branch
steps.description: Never debug on the main branch. Create an isolated environment to test the AI-generated solution safely.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a branch named 'fix-bug-alpha' and outline the steps to implement the suggested fix while maintaining architectural integrity.

steps.title: Validate and Merge
steps.description: Once the AI fix is applied, verify it with tests before merging back into your primary workflow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the changes made in the current branch against the previous commit. Ensure no new technical debt has been introduced.
steps.claude_code_command: git diff main...fix-bug-alpha && git merge fix-bug-alpha

pro_tips: Always commit your 'failed' attempts; they serve as a roadmap for the AI to know what approaches have already been tried.
Use Git tags to mark versions where the AI successfully resolved a complex architectural bottleneck.
Configure your .gitignore to exclude AI-generated logs to keep your repository clean and focused on source code.
When using Claude Code, always provide the specific error message and the file path to avoid hallucinations.
Treat your Git history as a conversation log with the AI; use descriptive commit messages that explain the 'why' behind the AI-assisted changes.
content.next_steps: Now that you can debug with surgical precision, start building a feature-rich project. Document your debugging journey in your portfolio to showcase how you handle complex technical hurdles.
content.conversion_block: You are no longer just a student; you are an AI-powered developer ready to ship. Take control of your workflow, master your Git history, and stop letting bugs define your timeline. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
